title: Customizable Documents & Identification
description: Configurable Mod for creating in-game "documents" for roleplay/realism on your Minecraft Server.
body:
This mod allows you to make custom "documents" for your minecraft world/server.    
Supports the use of local (resourcepack) and/or remote (url) assets.
    
Complex multi-page as well as simple "id" card documents can be created!
More information in the wiki!

Requires FCL (Fexcraft Common Library), except on 1.16!

### Video | [Bilibili Video](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1nh4y1s7gC)
